signals.headline: Putin Delivers Emergency Speech Warning West Against Iran Intervention | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Putin Delivers Emergency Speech Warning West Against Iran Intervention | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Russian President Vladimir Putin issued a stark Kremlin speech on April 16, 2026, challenging Western military involvement in Iran, escalating Middle East tensions amid the ongoing US-Iran war now in its 48th day.[1]
matched_markets: Will the US x Iran ceasefire be extended by April 21, 2026?
Will Russia enter Ternuvate again by April 30?
US x Iran permanent peace deal by April 30, 2026?

signals.headline: Trump Issues Ultimatum to Iran on Hormuz Blockade, Signals No Deal Without Compliance | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Trump Issues Ultimatum to Iran on Hormuz Blockade, Signals No Deal Without Compliance | NO | HIGH confidence**  
US President Donald Trump warned Iran to "make a deal" or face intensified naval blockade enforcement in the Strait of Hormuz, with interceptions authorized for violating vessels; no resolution confirmed.[2]
matched_markets: Strait of Hormuz traffic returns to normal by end of April?

signals.headline: US Ends Sanctions Waivers for Russia-Iran Oil Purchases | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
US Ends Sanctions Waivers for Russia-Iran Oil Purchases | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The US Treasury will not renew general licenses allowing limited Russian and Iranian oil buys by countries like India and China, enforcing stricter sanctions effective immediately.[3]

signals.headline: US-Iran Peace Talks Ongoing But Unconfirmed, Two-Week Ceasefire Ends April 22 | NO | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
US-Iran Peace Talks Ongoing But Unconfirmed, Two-Week Ceasefire Ends April 22 | NO | MED confidence**  
Islamabad talks failed over the weekend; White House describes second-round discussions as "productive" with no date or location set, as BBC reports from Tehran amid active conflict.[4]
matched_markets: Will the US x Iran ceasefire be extended by April 21, 2026?
Will the White House call a full lid by 6:30PM on April 14?
US x Iran permanent peace deal by April 30, 2026?

signals.headline: South Korea Inflation Rises to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea Inflation Rises to 2.2% in March 2026 | NO | MED confidence**

South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026, up from 2.0% in January and February, but below market forecasts of 2.4%[2]. This recent uptick, driven by factors like rising oil prices amid Middle East tensions, follows the Bank of Korea's decision on April 10, 2026, to hold its benchmark interest rate
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?
